response.overview: Ready for a crazy, green, bouncing bundle of mayhem? Z-Blob’s appetite is as big as his sense of adventure, and when Mateo isn't looking, he’s ready for action, and boy, does he find it. From wild and funny fails to fiery fiascos and explosive extravaganzas, Z-Blob turns the everyday into a fantastic frenzy of fun. Just remember, when you're in Z-Blob’s world, there's no such thing as a quiet lunch. Let's just hope Mateo doesn't turn around too soon!
response.title: DREAMZzz: Z-Blob in Left Alone
